metadata.title: IG Ratio — Instagram following & followers ratio
metadata.description: Analyze Instagram following and followers JSON exports in the browser

home.headerDescription: Compare Instagram following and followers export files locally in your browser
home.headerPrivacy: We don't collect any data - everything is stored in your browser's IndexedDB and localStorage

errors.selectFiles: Select at least one following JSON and one followers JSON file
errors.noUsernames: No usernames were found. Use the JSON files from Instagram → Settings → Download your information → followers_*.json and following.json (or equivalent)
errors.parseFailed: Failed to read or parse JSON

analyzer.introAfterLink: . Unzip the archive and choose the JSON files under
analyzer.introAfterCode: . Everything below runs in your browser; files are not uploaded

exportTutorial.trigger: Export your data from the Instagram app or website

steps.title: Open Accounts Centre
steps.description: In Instagram, go to Settings → Accounts Centre, then tap “See more in Accounts Centre”. Or start at Accounts Centre on the web

skipLink.label: Open this link and skip to step 4 directly

steps.title: Your information and permissions
steps.description: Under Account settings, choose “Your information and permissions”

steps.title: Create export
steps.description: Tap “Create export” to start a new download. This is also where you will find the files to download once export is complete

steps.title: Choose your Instagram profile
steps.description: Select the Instagram profile you want to export

steps.title: Export to device
steps.description: Choose “Export to device” (not an external service)

steps.title: Followers and following (JSON)
steps.description: Customise information: select “Followers and following”. Set Format to JSON, then tap “Start export”. When the file is ready, download and unzip it

analyzer.followingHint: Usually following.json. Multiple files are merged
analyzer.resetAnalysisTooltip: This will delete all site data stored in this browser: saved export snapshots, unfollower OK marks, and tracking settings
analyzer.resetAnalysisAriaLabel: Reset analysis. This will delete all site data stored in this browser

resetConfirm.title: Are you sure?
resetConfirm.description: This will delete all analysis data from your local machine — saved export snapshots, unfollower marks, and tracking settings.
resetConfirm.privacy: We never send or save any of your information on our servers. Everything is stored locally on your device.

indexedDbPrivacy: Your last analysis (summary and lists) is saved in IndexedDB on this device so it can load again after refresh
Unfollower marks and export tracking use the same storage
Everything is stored locally on your device
analyzer.indexedDbFailed: Could not use IndexedDB (storage may be blocked in private mode)

exportTracking.toggleHint: When on, each analysis saves your unique following and follower lists. The next time you analyze new export files, you will see who was added or removed
exportTracking.baselineOnly: No previous snapshot yet. This analysis is saved as the baseline for your next run

unfollowers.manageHint: Mark accounts you are fine with (celebrities, brands, etc.). Checks are stored in IndexedDB locally on your device

chart.title: Follow activity over time
chart.allHidden: All series hidden — click a legend item to show

steps.title: Export your data
steps.content: First, click here to learn how to export your Instagram followers and following data as JSON files.

steps.title: Upload Followers
steps.content: Upload the JSON file(s) containing your followers list that you exported from Instagram.

steps.title: Upload Following
steps.content: Upload the JSON file(s) containing the accounts you follow.

steps.title: Track changes between exports
steps.content: Enable this to compare your current export with the previous one. You'll see who unfollowed you, new followers, and more.

steps.title: Analyze
steps.content: Once both files are uploaded, hit this button to run the analysis.

steps.title: Done! See the magic happen ✨
steps.content: You'll instantly see who doesn't follow you back, who you don't follow back, and your mutual connections. All processed locally in your browser!
